result.title: The Codex app is now on Windows
result.description:
The Codex app is now on Windows.

Get the full Codex app experience on Windows with a native agent sandbox and support for Windows developer environments in PowerShell.

result.title: Interrupting and Adding Details in GPT-5.4 Thinking
result.description: In ChatGPT, GPT‑5.4 Thinking can now provide an upfront plan of its thinking, so you can adjust course mid-response while it’s working, and arrive at a final output that’s more closely aligned with what you need without additional turns.

result.title: Computer Use & Frontend UI with GPT-5.4 Thinking
result.description: OpenAI researcher SQ Mah explains how GPT-5.4 Thinking brings even more powerful capabilities to Codex — with more persistent computer-use (CUA) capabilities that cut token usage by two-thirds in some cases, and stronger image understanding for seamless website UI and image generation.
